title: Increase Session Timeout and Update Password Policy

deltas.old_content: Session timeout shall be 30 minutes of inactivity
deltas.new_content: Session timeout shall be 60 minutes of inactivity
deltas.rationale: User feedback indicated that 30 minutes was too short for typical workflows. Extended to 60 minutes to improve user experience while maintaining security.
Align with updated NIST guidelines that recommend longer password expiration periods to reduce user fatigue and password reuse.

deltas.new_content:
Biometric Authentication:
- The system shall support fingerprint authentication on supported devices
- The system shall support facial recognition on supported devices
deltas.rationale: Add support for biometric authentication to enhance security and user convenience on mobile devices.
